pages.text: $(o)"The sun was once black — that was its true color, the color light forgot."$()$(br2)$(4)FORBIDDEN.$() Last cry of the dying circle civilization. Three Dominion mages died in its writing. The colophon reads: $(o)"Do not write further."$()

pages.title: Effect
pages.text: Pick up to $(l)12$() random hostiles within $(l)40 blocks$():$(br)· Normal: $(l)40 magic damage$()$(br)· Boss: $(l)20 damage$()$(br2)$(l)Caster$() suffers Wither II (70s) — "Black-Sun Scar".$(br2)Cost: $(l)12000$() mana.

pages.title: Tactics
pages.text: Apocalypse-grade clear. Wither II for 70s leaves the caster on the brink — pre-cast Sovereign Aegis or hold a Notch Apple.$(br2)With Hollow Quarry, the two great Forbidden scrolls. Use sparingly.$(br2)Recommended: $(l)Tier 5 Primordial$() — written in blood: "the cost is shared with the future".
